question: Did the bundle adjustment solve well? Cameras aligned, calibration sound, optimization complete?
failure_owner: Photogrammetry processing operator (Agisoft settings + input data)
operator_action: Investigate convergence, alignment, calibration; reprocess with adjusted parameters
indicators_within: ba_reprojection_score(0.20), camera_alignment_score(0.20), camera_position_ensemble_score(0.15), optimization_completeness_score(0.10), precalibration_loaded_score(0.10), camera_model_consistency_score(0.10), self_calibration_quality_score(0.10), max_reproj_outlier_score(0.05)

question: Did image matching produce dense, well-distributed tie points and quality depth maps?
failure_owner: Photogrammetry processing operator + capture quality (overlap, texture)
operator_action: Reprocess at higher quality settings; investigate texture/overlap if sparse
indicators_within: alignment_accuracy_setting_score(0.20), depth_quality_setting_score(0.20), tiepoint_density_score(0.15), tiepoint_multiplicity_score(0.10), filtering_mode_appropriateness_score(0.10), marker_image_coverage_score(0.10), localized_reconstruction_score(0.10), atmospheric_artifact_composite_score(0.05)

question: Were GCPs adequate and well-distributed? Do check points verify accuracy? (Moment-of-truth block)
failure_owner: Survey design + capture + processing operator (marker roles)
operator_action: Reprocess with correct roles; re-survey if control inadequate
aggregator: weighted average; cp_rmse_score is primary moment-of-truth indicator at 0.35 within block
indicators_within: cp_rmse_score(0.35), gcp_rmse_score(0.15), per_cp_outlier_score(0.10), marker_role_consistency_score(0.08), gcp_coord_consistency_score(0.07), cp_count_statistical_score(0.06), gcp_count_in_bundle_score(0.05), gcp_bundle_distribution_score(0.04), gcp_vertical_coverage_score(0.03), z_xy_residual_ratio_score(0.03), per_marker_pix_error_score(0.02), reconstruction_drift_composite_score(0.01), no_markers_at_all_flag_score(0.01), no_gcps_used_flag_score(0.00)

question: Are output deliverables in the right frame, well-formed, classified correctly?
operator_action: Reproject; reprocess with ground classification; investigate void interpolation
aggregator: weighted average; DO1 zeros block when CRS mismatch
indicators_within: output_crs_project_match_score(0.30), output_crs_projection_score(0.20), internal_transform_consistency_score(0.15), dtm_classification_score(0.10), dem_void_interpolation_score(0.08), dem_resolution_score(0.07), deliverable_completeness_score(0.05), software_version_score(0.05)
